init.description: Initializes DemoTools once. Ensures persisted demos storage exists, optionally fetches git summary to derive a default title, creates/obtains a Demo singleton populated with steps (from options or persisted demos), registers 'Demo:StepsChanged' listener and marks DemoTools as initialized.

getDemos.description: Returns the persisted map of demos (title -> steps). Returns an empty object when nothing is stored.

getDemo.description: Returns steps array for the given demo title, or for the current options.title when title is omitted. Uses persisted demos as the source.

removeDemo.description: Deletes the persisted demo with the provided title (or current options.title if omitted) and persists the updated demos map.

removeDemos.description: Clears all persisted demos by setting the demos storage to an empty object.

listDemos.description: Logs a table to console showing persisted demos with title and number of steps for each.

setDemo.description: Stores or updates the demo under the given title with the provided steps and persists the demos map.

close.description: Closes DemoTools: closes and clears the Demo singleton if present, removes the 'Demo:StepsChanged' event listener, and marks DemoTools as uninitialized.

getSteps.description: Getter that returns a shallow copy of internal steps array.

addStep.description: Appends a new step to the end of the steps list (delegates to insertStep).

addHighlightStep.description: Adds a highlight-type step with default title if missing.

pickStep.description: Captures the currently hovered element(s), builds an XPath, prompts the user for step details via StepForm, and either updates the active step or adds a new step.

setSteps.description: Replaces current steps with provided collection (stops any running demo first), inserts each provided step, and selects the first step.

insertStep.description: Creates an adjusted Step instance and inserts it at the specified index (or activeStep+1 or end). Updates lastUpdatedStep and dispatches steps-changed event.

updateStep.description: Updates a step by index or title. If not provided, prompts user for updated data. Pauses run if running. Ensures xPathCheck is reset when xPath changes, replaces the step and dispatches steps-changed event.

removeStep.description: Removes step by index or by title substring match. If the removed step was active, clears selection. Dispatches steps-changed event.

removeAllSteps.description: Clears all steps and dispatches steps-changed event.

doStep.description: Executes a single step by index or title. Selects the step and performs actions depending on step.type (highlight, click, rightclick, hover, setValue, keyboard, or custom function).

run.description: Runs steps sequentially from options.from (or activeStep or 0) to options.till (or last). Dispatches run event, honors per-step interval or global interval, unhighlights after highlight steps, and stops when finished or paused.

jump.description: Validates index and executes the step at that index (delegates to doStep).

select.description: Sets activeStep in state and dispatches active-step-changed event.

swap.description: Swaps two steps by index (with validation), dispatches steps-changed event, and updates active selection if needed.

move.description: Moves a step from index to index2 (or moves activeStep if index2 omitted). Updates steps array and dispatches steps-changed event.

copy.description: Copies a step (from index1 or activeStep) and inserts the copy at index2 or adjacent position.

stop.description: Stops the demo run (pauses), clears lastUpdatedStep, removes highlight areas, clears selection and dispatches stop event.

pause.description: Sets running state to false to pause execution.

resume.description: Resumes execution by calling run() with no options.

destroy.description: Removes all steps and fully closes/destroys the demo instance (delegates to close).

close.description: Stops demo, resets internal state, removes event listeners, destroys UI helpers (Toolbar, prompts, forms), clears Options instance and clears singleton instance.

highlight.description: Highlights area for the specified highlighting step: determines area (from step.area or computes from selector/xPath), appends highlight area element, initializes driver.js with that element and drives the tour.

unhighlight.description: Destroys any active driver instance and removes any appended highlight area DOM nodes.

check.description: Used to quickly inspect an element or area: removes any existing highlight area, resolves element (from selector or appended area), then uses driver.js highlight to show a popover with a description. Ensures cleanup on driver destroy.

printSteps.description: Logs a console.table showing each step's title and type.

hotKeys.description: Pause the running demo or start picking the currently hovered element as a new step.
Stop the demo run and clear selection/highlights.
Advance to the next step: with Shift -> select the next step; without Shift -> execute (jump to) the next step.
Move to the previous step: with Shift -> select the previous step; without Shift -> execute (jump to) the previous step.
Swap the active step with the previous step (move it up).
Swap the active step with the next step (move it down).
Open update flow for the active step (only if the step is element-bound).
Open check prompt for the active step to validate or fix its target element.
